text:
creates this variable using the MBSF. We consider the beneficiary to have Medicare Advantage 
(also referred to as health maintenance organization [HMO]) coverage if the beneficiary had Medicare 
enrollment for the month, and the monthly beneficiary HMO (Medicare Advantage) indicator code 
was a value other than '0' (Not a member of an HMO) or '4' (Fee-for-service participant in case or 
disease management demonstration project) (i.e., BENE_HMO_IND_MM NOT IN ('0' '4').
